understanding.goal_understanding: Place each selectable piece onto a goal tile marked '+'. For levels with multiple goals, every goal must be simultaneously occupied by a selectable piece to win the level and progress through all levels until the game reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: CLICK action moves the currently selected piece toward the target_position [x, y] if path is clear, otherwise no movement occurs (blocked by walls/obstacles). Selection appears to occur by clicking on a piece's position. Repeated clicks between reachable positions like [9,21] and [21,21] cause back-and-forth movement. Clicks to unreachable positions like [18,21] or [35,17] have no effect. No pushing mechanics observed. Each action consumes one step from a finite budget per level.
